summary: Iteration 153: Tested scadenziario sync and financial dashboard fixes for bug where invoices without scadenze_pagamento were invisible to the scadenziario. All 13 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to auth requirement). Key fixes verified: 1) POST /api/invoices/sync-scadenze endpoint exists and generates scadenze from due_date as fallback, 2) Scadenziario dashboard includes invoices BOTH with and without scadenze_pagamento (sections 5a and 5b), 3) Financial dashboard uses $nin:['pagata'] pattern correctly to catch all unpaid statuses including null/undefined, 4) Frontend ScadenziarioPage calls both /fatture-ricevute/sync-fic AND /invoices/sync-scadenze in parallel.
critical_code_review_comments: Code verified: fatture_ricevute.py lines 1744-1782 correctly implements section 5b for invoices WITHOUT scadenze_pagamento
Code verified: invoices.py lines 762-811 implements sync-scadenze with due_date fallback
Code verified: financial_service.py line 97 uses $nin:['pagata'] pattern (catches null, undefined, non_pagata, parzialmente_pagata)
Code verified: ScadenziarioPage.js lines 80-91 calls both sync endpoints in parallel using Promise.all
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests verify code patterns and endpoint existence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 153 verified scadenziario/financial dashboard bug fixes: 1) sync-scadenze endpoint creates fallback scadenze from due_date when client has no payment_type; 2) scadenziario dashboard section 5b now includes invoices without scadenze_pagamento by using due_date; 3) $nin:['pagata'] pattern replaces old $in:['non_pagata','parzialmente_pagata',None] to catch ALL non-paid statuses; 4) Frontend calls both /fatture-ricevute/sync-fic AND /invoices/sync-scadenze on sync button click. Collections: invoices.scadenze_pagamento, invoices.payment_status, invoices.due_date.
verified_features: POST /api/invoices/sync-scadenze - endpoint exists and returns proper response
POST /api/invoices/sync-scadenze - uses due_date as fallback when payment_type unavailable
GET /api/fatture-ricevute/scadenziario/dashboard - section 5a handles invoices WITH scadenze_pagamento
GET /api/fatture-ricevute/scadenziario/dashboard - section 5b handles invoices WITHOUT scadenze_pagamento using due_date
financial_service.py - uses $nin:['pagata'] pattern for da_incassare_mese query
financial_service.py - uses $nin:['pagata'] pattern for receivables_aging query
financial_service.py - uses $nin:['pagata'] pattern for cashflow_forecast query
ScadenziarioPage.js - uses Promise.all for parallel sync execution

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Scadenziario shows only 2 invoices to collect instead of more, financial dashboard shows incorrect values
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Invoices without scadenze_pagamento field were invisible to scadenziario; payment_status queries used $in with explicit values missing null/undefined
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Added section 5b in scadenziario to include invoices using due_date, 2) Added sync-scadenze endpoint, 3) Changed payment_status queries to use $nin:['pagata']
bug_fix_verification.fix_verified: Yes - all code patterns verified through static analysis and endpoint existence tests
